nasb.text: and they saw the God of Israel; and under His feet there appeared to be a pavement of sapphire, as clear as the sky itself.

esv.text: and they saw the God of Israel. There was under his feet as it were a pavement of sapphire stone, like the very heaven for clearness.

cnv.text: 他們看見了以色列的　神；在　神的腳下有好像藍寶石一樣晶瑩的鋪路，好像天色一般明亮。

ccb.text: 他们都看见了以色列的上帝，祂的脚下好像是一片蓝宝石，像天一样明净。
